unresolved_items.name: gauge_freedom_removal_theorem
unresolved_items.why_open: Gauge compression has support, but no strict proof that all non-canonical degrees of freedom are removed.
unresolved_items.principle: A stronger constructive theory needs canonicalization, not just narrower basins.

unresolved_items.name: strict_gate_level_replay_closure
unresolved_items.why_open: Replay can recover structure, but stable_read and guarded_write do not re-close at strict gate level.
unresolved_items.principle: Memory replay must restore not only latent structure, but also the write/read gating regime that makes replay stable.

unresolved_items.name: unique_theta_star_generation_theorem
unresolved_items.why_open: The theory points to a sharply constrained basin, but not to a strict unique closed-form witness theta*.
unresolved_items.principle: Deterministic training still lacks final uniqueness at the canonical parameter level.

unresolved_items.name: ugmt_strict_fundamental_pass
unresolved_items.why_open: The universe-facing bridge is strong, but the final fundamental-law uniqueness has not closed.
unresolved_items.principle: UGMT still behaves like a strong candidate umbrella, not a final unique law.

unresolved_items.name: strict_biophysical_pass
unresolved_items.why_open: The architecture is biophysically compatible, but not yet a final unique biological implementation theory.
unresolved_items.principle: Compatibility is weaker than strict organism-level uniqueness.

summary.core_answer: The remaining closure problems have narrowed to replay gating, gauge removal, unique theta* witness, strict biophysical uniqueness, and strict universe-law closure.
